scripts.ensure-sidecar: bash -c 'TARGET=$(rustc -vV | grep host | cut -d" " -f2) && EXT="" && case "$TARGET" in *windows*) EXT=".exe" ;; esac && SRC="src-tauri/binaries/DepotDownloader-${TARGET}${EXT}" && [ -f "$SRC" ] || bash scripts/download-sidecar.sh --current && mkdir -p src-tauri/target/debug/binaries && ln -sf "$(pwd)/$SRC" "src-tauri/target/debug/binaries/DepotDownloader-${TARGET}${EXT}" && echo "Sidecar ready for ${TARGET}"'
scripts.build: bun run ensure-sidecar && tsc && vite build
